headline: Senior Paid Media Specialist.
copy: Dublin · Hybrid (WFH Wed & Fri) · Pension, health insurance, charity days. Apply at rooftoptwentytwo.ie/careers

headline: One team. [[The whole job.]]
copy: Strategy, brand, web and performance, all in-house. No silos, no hand-offs.

headline: A slow site is a [[leaky funnel.]]
copy: Every extra second of load time costs you conversions. Speed is a growth lever, not a nice-to-have.

headline: Rank for what your [[buyer]] actually searches.
copy: Not vanity keywords. The commercial terms that bring people ready to buy.

headline: Burning budget on Meta? [[Read this.]]
copy: Three mistakes we see all the time.

headline: Boosting posts.
copy: Boosting isn't a strategy. Build proper campaigns with real targeting and objectives.

headline: One ad, one audience.
copy: No testing means no learning. Run variants, kill the losers, scale the winners.

headline: Sending clicks to a weak page.
copy: Great ads, bad landing page. The whole funnel has to pull its weight.
